source.scope: Official-source-backed Eswatini normal annual individual income tax with standard and over-60 rebate schedules for the income year ended 30 June 2026.

SZ.notes: Normal annual individual income tax plus non-refundable standard or over-60 rebates. Redundant and retiring-person concessionary schedules and PAYE period calculations remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Normal annual individual income tax with caller-selected standard or over-60 rebate schedule for the income year ended 30 June 2026.
